content:
As a Linux Kernel Hacker noobie I start to read the LLD3 book (suggested by @Miguel Ojeda ) and I had an idea to describe my experience in translate the LLD3 example into rust, and I start with this reporsitory https://codeberg.org/vincenzopalazzo/linux-kernel-drivers

I'm also planning to release a blog searies https://blog.hedwing.dev/linux-kernel/intro_to_linux where feedback are welcome :)
